name: tasks-checklist
description: Example declarative extension that exposes Markdown task checklist metadata, a task sidebar widget, and a safe checklist transform without running arbitrary code.

permissions.reason: Reads local Markdown task list items from notes already available to Forge.
Writes a bounded checklist transform back to the current note when requested.

contributes.label: Task checklist metadata
contributes.description: Declares task item, open task, completed task, and completion ratio metadata for local notes.

contributes.label: Task summary
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported local task summary sidebar widget.

contributes.label: Convert lines to checklist
contributes.description: Declares the supported checklist transform for selected Markdown lines.

contributes.label: Tasks view
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported vault-wide task workspace view.
